REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO FRIST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 13, 2015 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-13-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT''S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ZIEGLER V. NICKEL (1998) 64 CAL.APP.4TH 545. MR. MOHANNA HAD BEEN ON NOTICE OF THE LEGAL REPRESENTATION ISSUE SINCE APRIL 1, 2015 AND HAD SUFFICIENT TIME TO HIRE A MEMBER OF THE BAR TO REPRESENT THE INTERESTS OF THE TRUST, THE ALLEGED OWNER OF THE PROPERTY AND MAKER OF NOTE/DOT. MR. MOHANNA FILED THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHOUT ADDRESSING THE ISSUE. ADDITIONALLY, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE FACTS TO SUPPORT A CAUSE OF ACTION AND NO POSSIBILITY OF AMENDMENT IS SUGGESTED BY PLAINTIFF. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Nov-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Keyhan Mohana (415-260-1873) Plaintiff/opposing party in Pro Per.
No other Appearances.

Plaintiff did not comply with the tentative ruling rule and is not permitted to argue. The Court informs Plaintiff the trust needs an attorney and the present demurrer is identical to the demurrer in April. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant''s Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is Sustained without leave to amend. Ziegler v. Nickel (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 545. Mr. Mohanna had been on notice of the legal representation issue since April 1, 2015 and had sufficient time to hire a member of the bar to represent the interests of the Trust, the alleged owner of the Property and maker of Note/DOT. Mr. Mohanna filed the First Amended Complaint and opposition to demurrer to First Amended Complaint without addressing the issue. Additionally, First Amended Complaint fails to state facts to support a cause of action and no possibility of amendment is suggested by Plaintiff. Moving party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Continued To Sep-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Continued To Aug-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Demurrer to Frist Amended Complaint is Continued to August 13, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per, Keyhan Mohanna (415-260-1873) is present. No other apperances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 22, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than June30, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Continued To Jul-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed April 29, 2015. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Defendant Wells Fargos Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by either party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

*Plaintiff in Pro Per Keyhan Mohanna arrived after the tentative ruling was adopted.
